cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: AgriDoc pairs a LoRA-fine-tuned Qwen2.5-1.5B (taught extension-officer reasoning: commit when clear, give a differential when the pattern is ambiguous, refuse pesticide/drug doses, redirect non-poultry livestock to a vet) with load-bearing RAG over a local crop/livestock corpus: the app retrieves and computes grounding from cosine similarity, and every cause is labelled library-backed vs reasoned. Fully offline on an 8 GB laptop via llama.cpp.

test_prompts.prompt: My maize leaves have pale streaks running along the veins and growth is stunted. What is the likely cause and what should I do?
My chickens are coughing, have runny eyes, and a few have died suddenly. What could this be and how should I respond?
